claude-subagent.description: Claude Code subagent — dispatched via Task tool within the session
claude-subagent.model_selection: Use /model opus|sonnet|haiku in Claude Code session before dispatching. All subagents inherit the session model — there is no per-subagent model override via the Task tool.

codex.model_selection: Append --model <model> to the task annotation, e.g. [codex --model gpt-5.4-mini]. Passed to codex-companion.mjs.
codex.concurrency_note: JSON-RPC broker queues requests — only one active at a time

gemini.description: Gemini CLI via scripts/gemini-ask.js — direct subprocess, no Docker
gemini.model_selection: Append --model flash|pro|pro-exp to the task annotation, e.g. [gemini --model pro]. Passed to gemini-ask.js --model flag.
